name: ui-shell
summary: Page layout and chrome: BoardPage assembles the full editor layout (palette + canvas + inspector + topbar + statusbar), wraps everything in DndContext, and owns zone-drawing toggle and generate modal state.
key_notes: DndContext wraps the entire BoardPage. Canvas registers window.__canvasAddNode because it can't receive props from DndContext handlers directly.
Canvas is keyed by boardId: <Canvas key={boardId} ...> — forces full remount (and RF state reset) when navigating boards.
isDrawingZone state lives in BoardPage and is passed down; Topbar has a Zone button that toggles it.
GenerateModal is rendered at BoardPage level, opened via Topbar 'Generate Docs' button.
Statusbar shows zoom level from React Flow onMoveEnd and syncError from useCanvasSync.
